name: Trellis
description: A fixed garden lattice with bright beads that glide along the diagonals — only the blooms move when the seed changes.

code.style: --bead: @p(var(--color2), var(--color3), var(--color4)); --rule: ( /* the bead's top mirrors its emitted left onto one diagonal, so it glides along the lattice */ --tp: @r(15, 85); --branch: @p(1, -1); background: linear-gradient(45deg, transparent calc(50% - 1px), var(--color1) calc(50% - 1px) calc(50% + 1px), transparent calc(50% + 1px)), linear-gradient(-45deg, transparent calc(50% - 1px), var(--color1) calc(50% - 1px) calc(50% + 1px), transparent calc(50% + 1px)); @random(${shapeFrequency}) { :after { content: ''; position: absolute; @size: 13%; left: calc(@var(--tp) * 1% - 6.5%); top: calc((50 + (@var(--tp) - 50) * @var(--branch)) * 1% - 6.5%); border-radius: 50%; background: var(--bead); transition: ease 700ms; } } );
code.doodle: :doodle { @grid: ${grid}; @size: ${width} ${height}; overflow:hidden; text-align:center; box-sizing:border-box } :container { background: var(--color0); overflow:hidden; }
